description: Dovetail was started in 2017 by two ex-Atlassians, Benjamin Humphrey and Bradley Ayers. We started Dovetail with a belief that deeply understanding one’s customers is the secret ingredient to making great products.Dovetail has grown a lot thanks to our 1,500+ happy customers. We believe that every single organization conducts research of some form. Our mission is to enable teams to make better decisions through deep customer understanding.
name: Dovetail
